execute.stdout:
hi -> short

code:
import io
import string

fn classify(_ n: Int) -> String
  if n <= 3
    "short"
  else if n <= 7
    "medium"
  else
    "long"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(all, "\n")
  let total = lines.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < total
    match lines.get(i)
    when Some(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      if n > 0
        println("#{line} -> #{classify(n)}")
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end
